Best Overall — Fitness & Health

Brooks Ghost 16

★★★★★4.8 398 reviews Category: Fitness & Health

$139.95

Steve owns & uses daily Verified owner since 2026
🛒 Buy on Amazon — $139.95 Free shipping with Prime

Steve's Verdict: Best Overall

The Brooks Ghost 16 is the ultimate daily trainer: soft DNA LOFT cushioning, smooth transitions, and a fit that works for almost every foot shape.

📝 Steve's Personal Notes

"500+ miles on my pair and they still feel great. I run 3-4x per week. These replaced my Nike Pegasus and I'm never going back."

Steve's Photo Proof

Every product on SteveGet is owned and tested by Steve. Here's the proof:

Pros & Cons

✅ Pros

  • Plush cushioning for daily miles
  • Smooth heel-to-toe transition
  • Wide toe box option available
  • Durable outsole — 500+ miles

❌ Cons

  • Not the lightest for racing
  • Neutral only (no stability version)
  • Break-in period of ~20 miles

Key Specifications

Drop12mm
Weight9.4 oz (M)
CushionDNA LOFT v2
SurfaceRoad

Where to Buy

The Brooks Ghost 16 is available on Amazon with free Prime shipping. Steve recommends buying from Amazon for the best return policy and price.

🛒 Buy on Amazon — $139.95 Free shipping with Prime
